name_address.value: Brewed and canned by Calvert Brewing Company, Upper Marlboro, MD, 20774.

health_warning.value: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

application.image_quality_notes: Flat label artwork, all text legible.
application.model_observations: Label is a flat unwrapped artwork showing front design with wrap-around left edge containing producer name/address and government warning. Certified Independent Craft Brewers Association seal present. UPC barcode 040232227776 visible at lower left.
